case_title: CHRISTIAN PAUL NAVARRO VS. STEPHEN STACK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY NAVARRO, CHRISTIAN PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT STACK, STEPHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-15-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STACK, STEPHEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAVARRO, CHRISTIAN PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STACK, STEPHEN $3,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,180.00, BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK: R. DENNIS; NOT REPORTED (506). ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT IS STAYED FOR 30 DAYS. THE PARTIES SHALL CONFER TO ATTEMPT TO ARRANGE FOR PAYMENT. IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE, DEFENDANT MAY FILE A MOTION FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER DENYING MOTION FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR FOR STATUS HEARING.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED FEB-24-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STACK, STEPHEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO APPEARANCE(S). NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF THE DEFENDANT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAVARRO, CHRISTIAN PAUL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC. 9, 2010. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC. 9, 2010 BY COMM. PAUL SALVIT, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO APR-19-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-10-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-19-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAVARRO, CHRISTIAN PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT STACK, STEPHEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2010 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY STEPHEN STACK SET FOR JUL-08-2010 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-09-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN 506. CASE CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECEMBER 9, 2010 AT 8:30AM. PENDING FURTHER HEARING, DEFENDANT SHALL MAKE PAYMENTS OF $100.00 PER MONTH, COMMENCING JULY 21, 2010, AND ON THE 21ST OF EACH MONTH UNTIL THE HEARING DATE. ALL PARTIES SHALL APPEAR FOR HEARING ON THE STATUS OF DEFENDANT'S ABILITY TO PAY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT STACK, STEPHEN HEARING SET FOR JUL-08-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY STEPHEN STACK ON DEC-09-2010 - DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR FOR STATUS HEARING. ORDER SIGNED.
